original: Putting strange objects around your neck probably isn’t the best idea you’ve had, but then again, neither is running around the most dangerous parts of the galaxy trying to claim a fortune. Pressing a button on the shining band, you pop it open and line it up around your neck. It’s a little tight, but it should fit without crushing your throat. Sucking in a nervous breath, you snap the ends together, feeling a hidden mechanism make a satisfying ‘click’. It warms against your [pc.skinFurScales], pulling tighter and tighter until you fear it might start to choke you. It never does. Just when you’re starting to panic, it stops shrinking.

original: Probing around the edge with a fingertip, you realize that it wasn’t just getting tighter - it was changing shape, molding itself to the exact shape of your neck. There isn’t a single gap where your flesh isn’t kissed by the warm, flexible metal. It hugs your [pc.skinFurScales] tightly, firm and constricting and yet forgiving enough not to pinch as you move around.
